reason: Place the new MagnetIngestController/MagnetIngestService/DTOs in the right packages and keep OpenList edits in integration/config.
OpenList defaults belong in application.yml; validate root paths in the service, not via fallback logic in client/properties.
Return ApiResponse<T> and throw BusinessException with Core-parity Chinese messages; let validation/unknown errors hit GlobalExceptionHandler.
Reuse OpenListClient primitives; add ensureDirectoryReady on the client rather than duplicating the anime service's path-prep.
Converged decisions: fire-and-forget, auth+quota, strict Core path parity, quota-on-success.
